name: beatly
description: Live soundtrack controls for coding agents. Requires system-wide SuperCollider.

interface.shortDescription: Live soundtrack controls for coding agents
interface.longDescription: Control Beatly playback, agent-reactive soundtrack updates, and the local jukebox from Codex. Requires system-wide SuperCollider with scsynth and sclang on PATH.
defaultPrompt: Start Beatly and play something warm.
Switch Beatly to a more energetic genre.
Show me the Beatly state and current playback.
